title: triplophyllum funestum
intro: Triplophyllum funestum is a species of flowering plant in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the ferns. It is native to tropical Africa, where it can be found growing in the wild. The medicinal properties of Triplophyllum funestum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
